name: Iron Fist & Spiderman | Lin Lie & Peter Parker
description:
Peter, no! Peter, yes!

New York? A mess. Chips? Check! Slumber party supplies? Of course! What better way to get your mind off of superhero-ing stress than a good ol' sleepover?!


Omgg why are they both shirtless?? Like, fr. At least they remain cuties though.
Tested out their full solo versions before this, and Peter's really flirty for some reason? Lin Lie seems fine, though, albeit ooc since I haven't really consumed enough fanfics/have references of his version of Iron Fist? I also wrote him as Lie, although some people use his full name (like what I did at the start of the other sentence lol). At first I though the e at the end of Lie was just something extra that was added after the romanization, but I also found out there's another Marvel character called Lin Li, which is cool.


I was supposed to release this one before the Reed solo bot, but I just couldn't think of an intro message, even though I had the scenario down.


Also, why is it a thing now that whenever I paste an image onto the character bio, it also overrides the bot pic??
creator: Oups
